text:
(In reply to Mark Felder from comment #3)
I am sure the only C compiler I have is clang from base.
I did a "make world", inspected the pkg database, ran pkg_libcheck,
periodic weekly, inspected "locate" output, reinstalled devel/jam.
Still no luck.

Could there be something wrong with devel/jam ?
